name: Infinitrack Earth Slicer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アースシェイカー
desc:
2 Level 9 monsters
When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can attach that monster to this card as material. You can only use each of the following effects of "Infinitrack Earth Slicer" once per turn.
● You can detach any number of materials from this card, then target that many cards on the field; destroy them.
● If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 Machine Link Monster; Special Summon this card in Defense Position.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Attaches from your opponent's Graveyard as Xyz Material
Attaches from your opponent's Extra Deck as Xyz Material
Attaches your opponent's banished cards as Xyz Material
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
